common.no_results: Nobena organizacija ne ustreza tem filtrom.

index.title: ESRF.net — Evropska skupnost za varnost in odpornost
index.description: ESRF.net je decentralizirana skupnost 1.931 organizacij v 30 evropskih državah, ki krepijo varnost in odpornost prek desetih ključnih sektorjev in petih moralnih načel.
index.hero_deck: Medtem ko vlade oblikujejo politike in mednarodna telesa usklajujejo, ESRF.net združuje podjetja, institucije in državljane, katerih vsakodnevno delo tiho vzdržuje naše skupno življenje — decentraliziran okvir, ki ga poganjajo organizacije, ki poganjajo gospodarstvo.
index.hero_caption: Skupnost praktikov, ki zajema devetindvajset narodov, vezana s petimi moralnimi načeli.
index.foundation_sub: Za lokalni vpliv. Za skupno odpornost. Za Evropo, ki zdrži.
index.foundation_body_1: Evropski okvir za varnost in odpornost je temelj ESRF.net — decentralizirana mreža, zgrajena za podjetnike z lokalnim vplivom in od njih. Verjamemo, da varnost ni zgolj vladni mandat. Je podjetniška odgovornost in državljanska dolžnost.
index.foundation_pull: Varnost ni le mandat. Je odgovornost, ki jo nosimo skupaj.
index.foundation_body_2: Z gradnjo odpornosti od spodaj navzgor povezujemo organizacije v devetindvajsetih državah v samozdržne ekosisteme z regionalnim vplivom. Fundacija usmerja donacije, prispevke in usklajen kapital v pobude, ki krepijo mrežo in širijo njen doseg po celini.
index.foundation_body_3: Organizacije so razvrščene v deset ključnih sektorjev, usklajenih z direktivo EU NIS2, in vodene s petimi moralnimi načeli: budnostjo, skrbništvom, opolnomočenjem, solidarnostjo in obnovo.
index.sectors_lede: Vsaka organizacija v skupnosti ESRF.net je razvrščena v deset ključnih sektorjev — področja, kjer se odpornost gradi ali izgublja. Spodnje številke odražajo trenutni imenik.
index.atlas_lede: Vsaka igla je organizacija; vsaka skupina, mesto; vsaka barva, sektor. Atlas je živi zapis tistih, ki vzdržujejo vsakodnevni stroj odporne Evrope.
index.join_title: Ali vaša organizacija prispeva k Evropi, ki zdrži?
index.join_sub: Zahtevaj vpis in zavzemi svoje mesto na atlasu. Članstvo v skupnosti ESRF.net je brezplačno za organizacije, katerih delo krepi evropsko varnost in odpornost.
index.hero_deck_html: Medtem ko vlade oblikujejo politike in mednarodna telesa usklajujejo, ESRF.net združuje podjetja, institucije in državljane, katerih vsakodnevno delo tiho vzdržuje naše skupno življenje — decentraliziran okvir, ki ga poganjajo organizacije, ki poganjajo gospodarstvo.
index.hero_fig_caption: Skupnost praktikov, ki zajema devetindvajset narodov, vezana s petimi moralnimi načeli.
index.foundation_body_1_html: Evropski okvir za varnost & odpornost je temelj ESRF.net — decentralizirana mreža, zgrajena za podjetnike z lokalnim vplivom in od njih. Verjamemo, da varnost ni zgolj vladni mandat. Je podjetniška odgovornost in državljanska dolžnost.
index.foundation_pull_html: Varnost ni le mandat. Je odgovornost, ki jo nosimo skupaj.
index.foundation_body_3_html: Organizacije so razvrščene v deset ključnih sektorjev, usklajenih z direktivo EU NIS2, in vodene s petimi moralnimi načeli: budnostjo, skrbništvom, opolnomočenjem, solidarnostjo in obnovo.
index.analytics_lede: Tri slike, objavljene z vsako številko — kjer je skupnost skoncentrirana, kjer je redka in kako se deset sektorjev porazdeli po državah.
index.fig01_desc: Horizontalni stolpičasti grafikon, ki primerja deset ključnih sektorjev. Vodi Reševanje v sili in krizno upravljanje; Energetska odpornost je na meji.
index.fig02_desc: Grafikon za devetindvajset narodov. Nizozemska, Združeno kraljestvo in Nemčija trenutno nosijo največ bremena mreže.
index.dispatch_lede: Uredniško izbrana zbirka evropskih signalov varnosti, odpornosti in kriz — razvrščena po sektorju, ki ga vsaka zgodba zadeva. Celoten bilten se sproti posodablja.
index.fig03_desc: Kako se deset sektorjev porazdeli med petnajst najbolj zastopanih držav — specializacija v primerjavi z raznolikostjo na prvi pogled.

directory.title: Imenik — ESRF.net
directory.description: Prebrskajte 1.931 organizacij v 30 evropskih državah, ki tvorijo skupnost ESRF.net — filtrirajte po sektorju in državi.
directory.hero_deck: 1.931 organizacij — razvrščenih po sektorju, državi in poslanstvu. Iščite, filtrirajte in preberite, kdo drži vsak del Evrope skupaj.
directory.join_sub: Vsaka organizacija, katere delo prispeva k evropski varnosti in odpornosti, je dobrodošla v skupnosti ESRF.net.

map.title: Atlas — ESRF.net
map.description: Atlas skupnosti na celozaslonskem prikazu — 1.931 organizacij na karti 30 evropskih držav, barvno kodiranih in filtriranih po sektorju.
map.heading: Atlas skupnosti
map.instructions: Kliknite na kateri koli marker za podrobnosti o organizaciji. Filtrirajte po sektorju ali iščite po imenu.

analytics.title: Analitika — ESRF.net
analytics.description: Analitični podatki za skupnost ESRF.net — porazdelitev sektorjev, razčlenitev po državah in rast skupnosti.
analytics.hero_deck: Tri slike, objavljene z vsako številko. Kjer se skupnost skoncentrira, kjer je redka in kako se deset sektorjev porazdeli po državah.
analytics.fig01_desc: Reševalne službe in inženirji tveganj so stebri skupnosti; energetika in promet sta na meji, kjer je okvir najmlajši.
analytics.fig01_caption: Sl. 01 — Število organizacij v vsakem od desetih ključnih sektorjev. Barva stolpca sledi sektorju.
analytics.fig02_desc: Devetindvajset narodov, vsak prispeva del celote. Nizozemska, Združeno kraljestvo in Nemčija trenutno nosijo največ; Malta in Bolgarija najmanj — ravnotežje, ki ga okvir aktivno prerazporeja.
analytics.fig02_caption: Sl. 02 — Porazdelitev vpisanih organizacij v 30 državah, zastopanih na atlasu.
analytics.cta_sub: Bilten vsak dan arhivira evropske signale odpornosti v sektorju, ki ga zadeva.
analytics.fig03_desc: Kako se deset vitalnih sektorjev porazdeli med petnajst najbolj zastopanih držav. Vsak stolpec je država; vsaka barva je sektor. Kjer prevladuje ena barva, je lokalni ekosistem specializiran; kjer je porazdelitev enakomerna, je raznolik.
analytics.fig03_caption: Sl. 03 — Sektorska sestava petnajstih držav z največ vpisanimi organizacijami. Barva stolpca sledi paleti sektorja.

news.title: Bilten — ESRF.net
news.description: Bilten ESRF.net — uredniško izbrani evropski signali varnosti in odpornosti, razvrščeni po sektorju in temi.
news.hero_deck: Uredniško izbrani register evropskih signalov varnosti, odpornosti in kriz — vsak razvrščen po sektorju in temi. Sproti se posodablja.
news.submit_sub: Organizacije, vpisane na atlas, lahko prispevajo zgodbe, poročila in posodobitve k biltenu ESRF.net.

about.title: Fundacija — ESRF.net
about.description: O ESRF.net — Evropski okvir za varnost in odpornost, njegova listina, pet moralnih stebrov in kako se organizacije pridružijo skupnosti.
about.hero_deck: Evropski okvir za varnost in odpornost — temelj ESRF.net — je zgrajen na preprostem prepričanju: odpornost ni izključno delo držav. To je vsakodnevno delo organizacij, institucij in državljanov, katerih lokalni vpliv vzdržuje celoto.
about.charter_quote: Varnost ni le mandat. Je odgovornost, ki jo nosimo skupaj.
about.what_sub: Decentralizirano po zasnovi, državljansko po namenu, evropsko po dosegu.
about.what_body_1_html: ESRF.net je skupnostna plast Evropskega okvira za varnost & odpornost — mreža 1.931 organizacij v 30 državah, katerih delo, vidno ali ne, krepi sposobnost celine, da prepreči škodo, zaščiti tisto, kar nas vzdržuje, se pripravi na pretrese, se odzove v solidarnosti in se obnovi z obnovo.
about.what_body_2_html: Tam, kjer vlade določajo politiko, mednarodni organi pa usklajujejo, ESRF.net združuje podjetnike, institucije in prve posredovalce, katerih vsakdanja praksa je dejanska podlaga odpornosti. Organizacije razvrščamo v deset vitalnih sektorjev — usklajenih z direktivo EU NIS2.
about.what_body_3: Fundacija usmerja donacije, prispevke in usklajen kapital v pobude, ki krepijo mrežo in širijo njen doseg. Vpisi so brezplačni; prispevki so dobrodošli; sodelovanje je vprašanje skrbnosti, ne naročnine.
about.pillar1_body_html: Opaziti, preden postane glasno. Prvi steber je potrpežljiva, strukturna pozornost do signalov, scenarijev in sistemskih tveganj — obveščanje, ki prispe dan prezgodaj in nikoli minuto prepozno.
about.pillar2_body_html: Varovati tisto, kar nas vzdržuje. Drugi steber je disciplina branjenja fizičnih, digitalnih in institucionalnih meja. Skrbništvo pomeni, da ne lastuješ tistega, kar varuješ; hraniš ga za vse, ki so od tega odvisni.
about.pillar3_body_html: Biti pripravljen, skupaj. Tretji steber je negovanje možnosti — sposobnost ukrepati samozavestno, ko se načrt sreča z vremenom. Pripravljenost ni kopičenje; je skupna zmožnost prilagajanja.
about.pillar4_body_html: Delovati kot eno, ko šteje. Četrti steber je krepost prihoda — zanesljivo, hitro, skupaj. Solidarnost ni občutek; je praksa, ki jo je treba vaditi dolgo preden je potrebna.
about.pillar5_body_html: Vstati močnejši kot prej. Peti steber je disciplina prenašanja udarcev in ponovnega zagona sistemov. Prenova vsako okrevanje obravnava kot priložnost, da se popravi, kar je razkrila zadnja kriza.
about.join_sub: Vpis je brezplačen. Skrbnost je edina nadomestilo, ki ga zbiramo.
about.join_body_1: Vsaka organizacija — komercialna, institucionalna, neprofitna — katere delo krepi evropsko varnost in odpornost je dobrodošla na atlasu. Obstajajo trije koraki:
about.join_step_1_html: Zahtevaj vpis. Izpolnite prijavni obrazec z imenom vaše organizacije, enostavčnim opisom in vašim primarnim sektorjem prakse.
about.join_step_2_html: Uskladite se z listino. Vsaka vpisana organizacija se naroči na listino ESRF.net — ena stran, brez drobnega tiska.
about.join_step_3_html: Pojavite se na atlasu. Vaš vpis se aktivira v imeniku, na zemljevidu in, kjer je relevantno, v biltenu.
about.join_body_2: Prispevki fundaciji — finančni ali v naravi — so dobrodošli, a nikoli zahtevani. ESRF.net ne prodaja vpisov, ne razvršča svojih članov in ne zaračunava naročnin.

privacy.title: Zasebnost — ESRF.net
privacy.description: Politika zasebnosti za ESRF.net — kako zbiramo, uporabljamo in varujemo vaše podatke.

countries.title: Države — ESRF.net
countries.description: Prebrskajte organizacije ESRF.net po državah — 30 evropskih narodov v skupnosti.
countries.hero_deck: Vsaka država v skupnosti ESRF.net — od Atlantika do Baltika, od Arktike do Sredozemlja.

footer.brand_desc: European Security & Resilience Foundation — decentralizirana skupnost 1.931 organizacij v 30 državah.

pillar.prevent_body: Opaziti, preden postane glasno — strukturna pozornost na signale in sistemska tveganja.
pillar.protect_body: Varovati tisto, kar nas vzdržuje — kritične funkcije, vitalne procese, skupni interesi.
pillar.prepare_body: Biti pripravljen, skupaj — z usposabljanjem, inovacijami in trajnostno pripravljenostjo.
pillar.respond_body: Delovati kot eno, ko je to pomembno — zanesljive mreže, hitra koordinacija, medsebojna podpora.
pillar.recover_body: Vstati močnejši — absorbirati pretrese, pospešiti okrevanje, obnoviti sistem.

form.hero_deck: Vsaka organizacija, katere delo krepi evropsko varnost in odpornost, je dobrodošla v skupnosti ESRF.net. Prijave se pregledajo v treh delovnih dneh. Vpis je brezplačen.
form.label_gdpr: Strinjam se s politiko zasebnosti in dovoljujem shranjevanje teh podatkov za namen pregleda zahteve za vpis.
form.placeholder_description: En ali dva stavka, ki opisujeta, kaj počne vaša organizacija…
form.hint_website: Mora se začeti z https:// ali http://
form.success_body: Hvala za vašo prijavo. Uredniška ekipa ESRF.net bo pregledala vaš vpis v treh delovnih dneh. Na navedeni e-poštni naslov boste prejeli potrditev.
form.err_too_fast: Prosimo, si vzemite trenutek za pregled obrazca pred pošiljanjem.
form.err_gdpr: Za nadaljevanje prosimo sprejmite politiko zasebnosti.
form.err_url: Prosimo, vnesite veljavno spletno naslov, ki se začne z https:// ali http://
form.err_generic: Prišlo je do napake. Prosimo, poskusite znova.
form.err_network: Omrežna napaka — prosimo, preverite povezavo in poskusite znova.

modal.title: Dodajte svojo organizacijo
modal.intro: Vsaka organizacija, katere delo krepi evropsko varnost in odpornost, je dobrodošla. Vpis je brezplačen. Prijave se pregledajo v treh delovnih dneh.

sponsor.page_title: Podprite ESRF.net — Sponzorirajte skupnost evropske varnosti in odpornosti
sponsor.hero_deck: Podprite mrežo, ki povezuje evropsko skupnost varnosti in odpornosti — 1.931 organizacij, 30 držav, deset ključnih sektorjev. Vaša podpora ohranja atlas neodvisen, odprt in rastoč.
sponsor.why_title: Zgrajeno na neodvisnosti, vzdrževano z mecenstvom.
sponsor.why_body_1: ESRF.net je uredniško neodvisen. Ne sprejemamo vladnih mandatov, oglaševanja ali plačanih uvrstitev. Edini način, da to deluje, je transparentno mecenstvo organizacij, ki verjamejo v poslanstvo.
sponsor.why_body_2: ESRF.net dosega strokovnjake za varnost in odpornost v 30 evropskih državah — vodje nabave, svetovalce za politiko, koordinatorje kriz in poslovne voditelje. Sponzorstvo uskladi vašo znamko z najbolj namenskorelevantno evropsko mrežo na tem področju.
sponsor.why_body_3: Objavljamo pregledno: vsak sponzor je imenovan, vsaka stopnja razkrita. Uredniška stališča ESRF.net nikoli niso pod vplivom poslovnih razmerij.
sponsor.tiers_title: Trije načini, kako biti del tega.
sponsor.tier1_benefit1: Logotip na domači strani, imeniku in vseh straneh držav
sponsor.tier1_benefit2: Naveden v vsaki izdaji ESRF.net Dispatcha
sponsor.tier1_benefit3: Logotip na tiskanih in digitalnih materialih
sponsor.tier1_benefit4: Značka Ustanovnega mecena na vašem vpisu
sponsor.tier1_benefit5: Posebna zahvalna uredniška vsebina v prvem letu
sponsor.tier2_tagline: „Usklajeno z vitalnim sektorjem po vaši izbiri.“
sponsor.tier2_benefit1: Logotip na straneh sektorjev, ki jih izberete
sponsor.tier2_benefit2: Naveden v izdajah Dispatcha, ki pokrivajo vaš sektor
sponsor.tier2_benefit3: Značka Programskega partnerja na vašem vpisu
sponsor.tier3_tagline: »Podpira poslanstvo in je za to priznan.«
sponsor.tier3_benefit2: Značka Podpornika skupnosti na vašem vpisu
sponsor.no_sponsors: Naši ustanovni meceni se trenutno izbirajo. Povpraševajte spodaj in bodite med prvimi.
sponsor.success_body: Hvala za zanimanje za podporo ESRF.net. Član ekipe vas bo kontaktiral v treh delovnih dneh.
sponsor.faq1_q: Ali sponzorstvo vpliva na uredniške odločitve?
sponsor.faq1_a: Ne. ESRF.net je uredniško neodvisen. Sponzorji so transparentno prepoznani, vendar nimajo vpliva na imenik ali uredniško vsebino Dispatcha.
sponsor.faq2_a: Sponzorske pogodbe so letne. Podaljšanja so najprej ponujena trenutnim sponzorjem, preden se javno objavijo nova mesta.
sponsor.faq3_q: Ali lahko sponzoriramo določeno državo ali sektor?
sponsor.faq3_a: Da — sponzorstva Programme Partner je mogoče uskladiti s specifičnim vitalnim sektorjem po vaši izbiri. Če vaša organizacija deluje, na primer, v Kritični infrastrukturi ali Zdravju in medicinski proizvodnji, bo vaš logotip prikazan na straneh teh razdelkov. Omenite to v povpraševanju in dogovor bomo prilagodili ustrezno.
sponsor.faq4_a: Sprejemamo bančni prenos (SEPA in mednarodni) in fakturiranje. Popolne podrobnosti so navedene po podpisu sporazuma.
sponsor.faq5_q: Ali je ESRF.net odprt za organizacije izven Evrope?
sponsor.faq5_a: Da. Dobrodošla so povpraševanja za sponzorstvo od organizacij po vsem svetu, katerih delo se prepleta z evropsko politiko, infrastrukturo ali obrambnim sodelovanjem.
sponsor.placeholder_message: Povejte nam o svoji organizaciji in zakaj bi radi podprli ESRF.net…

ads.label: Advertisement

editorial_oil.title_tag: Oil Shortage in Europe: what to do and how to communicate as a business — ESRF.net
editorial_oil.meta_desc: Europe is preparing for potential shortages of oil, diesel, kerosene and petrol. An editorial on operational measures and effective customer communication for businesses.
editorial_oil.hero_deck: What to do and how to communicate as a business to your customers — an operational and communications framework for the oil crisis of April 2026.
editorial_oil.p_situation_1: Europe is preparing for potential shortages of oil, diesel, kerosene and petrol as a result of the ongoing blockade of the Strait of Hormuz since late February 2026, after the US and Israel launched a war against Iran. Shell CEO Wael Sawan warned on 24 March 2026 that Europe could face physical shortages from April onwards, starting with kerosene, then diesel and later petrol. Global oil production dropped by approximately 10.1 million barrels per day in March — one of the most severe supply shocks ever recorded.
editorial_oil.p_situation_2: The International Energy Agency released a record 400 million barrels from strategic reserves on 11 March 2026 to calm markets. In the Netherlands, phase 1 of the National Oil Crisis Plan (LCP-O) was activated on 17 April 2026; there are no acute shortages yet, but monitoring has been intensified and consultations are underway with major consumers such as the transport sector. The European Commission does not foresee an acute shortage for April but is working on a package of measures.
editorial_oil.h2_what: What do we do about an oil shortage in Europe?
editorial_oil.p_what_1: At the macro level, Europe is deploying a combination of supply measures (releasing strategic reserves, additional LNG imports), demand reduction (less travel, remote work, more efficient driving) and phased crisis plans per member state. Energy Commissioner Dan Jørgensen is preparing the EU for a potentially "prolonged" energy crisis. The Netherlands works with four escalation phases of the LCP-O, where even in the most severe phase the emphasis is on voluntary measures and communication.
editorial_oil.p_what_2: At company level, this means concretely: reducing fuel consumption, combining trips, critically reviewing fleet, spreading inventories, exploring alternative routes and energy sources, and above all: communicating timely and clearly with customers about potential consequences.
editorial_oil.h2_tips: Ten communication tips for businesses towards customers
editorial_oil.tip1_title: Communicate early, not only when there is a problem
editorial_oil.tip1_body: Silence is interpreted by customers in a post-pandemic market as a sign of trouble. Inform customers proactively as soon as you see risks in your supply chain or energy supply — even if you cannot yet give an exact timeline. Do not wait until a delivery fails.
editorial_oil.tip2_body: Write from the customer's perspective: what does the oil shortage mean concretely for their order, delivery time or price. Avoid lengthy explanations about internal problems and focus on what the customer can expect and what choices they have.
editorial_oil.tip3_title: Be transparent about causes and uncertainty
editorial_oil.tip3_body: Explain that the situation stems from an external, geopolitical shock (Strait of Hormuz, Middle East) and that governments also face uncertainty. Customers accept bad news better when they understand the context and notice that you are hiding nothing.
editorial_oil.tip4_title: Be clear and concrete — no jargon
editorial_oil.tip4_body: Use short sentences, concrete dates and specific consequences ("delivery time increases from 3 to 7 working days", "fuel surcharge of X% from 1 May"). Vague language ("possible slight delay") undermines trust.
editorial_oil.tip5_title: Communicate price increases openly and substantiated
editorial_oil.tip5_body: Many SMEs need to raise prices due to increased fuel and input costs — communicate this clearly rather than obscuring it. Substantiate with facts (e.g. doubled kerosene prices, diesel price index) so customers can see it is not an arbitrary increase.
editorial_oil.tip6_body: Give customers options for action: alternative products, bundled deliveries, flexible delivery dates, digital alternatives to physical visits or longer contract terms that provide price certainty. Customers who have choices feel less like victims.
editorial_oil.tip7_body: Determine where your target audience gets information (newsletter, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, customer portal) and communicate there consistently. KFC handled its 2018 chicken crisis well by actively responding on social media and keeping a website with open locations live.
editorial_oil.tip8_body: Make clear that you understand the customer's inconvenience ("I understand how important this delivery is to you") rather than responding in a purely transactional way. Empathy builds trust that discounts or promotions cannot replace.
editorial_oil.tip9_title: Connect your message to your sustainability and savings story
editorial_oil.tip9_body: Link operational adjustments (fewer trips, more efficient driving, remote work, fleet electrification) to your CO₂ and sustainability goals — provided this is credible and visible throughout your entire business operations. Greenwashing is penalised, so only communicate what you actually do.
editorial_oil.tip10_title: Prepare crisis communication templates and FAQs
editorial_oil.tip10_body: Develop playbooks now for scenarios (price increases, delivery delays, distribution disruptions) with flexible templates rather than rigid scripts. Train customer service teams on tone, empathy and current facts so they do not give contradictory information.
editorial_oil.example_msg: Dear customer, due to the ongoing blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and the resulting pressure on European fuel supplies, we expect from [date] potentially longer delivery times and a fuel surcharge of [X%]. We are following the government's National Oil Crisis Plan and exploring alternative routes and suppliers. We will keep you updated weekly via [channel]. Do you have questions about your specific order? Please contact us via [contact].
editorial_oil.p_example_after: This message combines early communication, transparency, concreteness, customer perspective and actionable options — the core elements of effective supply chain crisis communication.
editorial_oil.h2_internal: Internal preparation parallel to external communication
editorial_oil.internal_1: Limit and optimise the fleet; consider a mobility budget instead of lease cars.
editorial_oil.internal_2: Refuel smartly (outside motorways), combine trips per region, and reward fuel-efficient driving.
editorial_oil.internal_3: Make aerodynamic and technical adjustments (remove roof racks, correct tyre pressure, thinner engine oil).
editorial_oil.internal_4: Coordinate with large-consumer consultations and industry associations that participate in cabinet discussions on the LCP-O.
editorial_oil.internal_5: Monitor EU coordination group decisions and IEA market reports for early signals.
editorial_oil.internal_closing: The better you are prepared internally, the more credible your external communication becomes.
editorial_oil.join_sub: Organisations on the ESRF.net atlas can contribute stories, reports and analyses to the Dispatch.

editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html: Since late February 2026, the Strait of Hormuz has been blocked as a result of the armed conflict between the United States, Israel and Iran. [1] [2] This blockade affects the most important transit route for Middle Eastern oil and therefore impacts all of Europe's energy supply.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_2: Shell CEO Wael Sawan warned on 24 March that Europe could face physical shortages from April onwards — first kerosene, then diesel and eventually petrol. [3] [4] In March, global oil production dropped by approximately 10.1 million barrels per day, one of the most severe supply shocks in decades. [5]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_3: The International Energy Agency (IEA) released a record 400 million barrels from strategic reserves on 11 March. [6] [7] In the Netherlands, phase 1 of the National Oil Crisis Plan (LCP-O) took effect on 17 April: there are no acute shortages yet, but the government is intensifying monitoring and consulting with major consumers in the transport sector. [8] [9] The European Commission does not foresee an immediate shortage for now, but is preparing a package of measures. [10] [11]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.h2_2: What does this mean for Europe — and for businesses?
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_4: At a European level, three tracks are being pursued: supply measures such as releasing strategic reserves and additional LNG imports, demand reduction through less travel and remote working, and phased crisis plans per member state. [6] [12] [9] Energy Commissioner Dan Jørgensen is preparing the EU for what he calls a "prolonged" energy crisis. [13] The Dutch National Oil Crisis Plan has four escalation phases, with the government relying mainly on voluntary measures and communication up to the most severe phase. [8]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_5: For businesses it comes down to: reducing fuel consumption, combining trips, critically reviewing the vehicle fleet, spreading inventories, exploring alternative routes and energy sources, and above all: communicating clearly and in good time with customers about what is changing and why. [14] [15]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.tip_title: Communicate early — not only when there is a problem
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_6: In a post-pandemic market, customers interpret silence as bad news. [14] Inform them proactively as soon as you spot risks in your supply chain, even if you cannot yet give an exact timeline. [15] [16] Never wait until a delivery fails.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_7: Do not focus on your own internal problems. Tell the customer what the oil shortage specifically means for their order, delivery time or price. [14] Keep it short and indicate what choices the customer has.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.tip_title_3: Be transparent about causes and uncertainty
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_8: Explain that the situation stems from a geopolitical shock — the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz — and that governments are also dealing with uncertainty. [1] [10] Customers accept bad news more readily when they understand the context and see that you are not withholding anything. [16] [17]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_9: Use specific facts and figures: "delivery time increases from 3 to 7 working days" or "fuel surcharge of X% from 1 May". [17] Phrasing like "some possible delay" actually creates more concern than clarity.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.tip_title_5: Back up price increases with facts
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_10: Many businesses need to raise prices due to increased fuel and input costs. Communicate this honestly rather than disguising it. [16] Refer to concrete figures — doubled kerosene prices, the diesel price index — so that customers can see it is not an arbitrary increase. [3]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.tip_title_6: Offer alternatives and a sense of agency
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_11: Give customers choices: alternative products, bundled deliveries, flexible delivery dates, digital alternatives to physical visits, or longer contracts that offer price certainty. [14] [17] Those who have a choice feel less like victims.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_12: Identify where your audience gets their information — newsletter, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, customer portal — and communicate consistently there. [15] KFC handled its 2018 chicken crisis well by actively responding on social media and maintaining a live overview of open locations. [18]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_13: Show that you understand the customer's inconvenience. A sentence like "I understand how important this delivery is to you" does more than a discount. [17] Empathy builds trust that promotions cannot replace.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.tip_title_9: Link your message to sustainability — but only if it is genuine
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_14: Operational adjustments such as fewer trips, more economical driving and fleet electrification often align with existing sustainability goals. [12] [13] Communicate that, but only if it is visible and credible. Greenwashing is punished severely.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_15: Develop playbooks now for scenarios such as price increases, delivery delays and distribution disruptions. Use flexible templates, not rigid scripts. [16] [17] Train your customer service team on tone, empathy and current facts so they do not give contradictory information.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_16: Subject: Delivery update — European fuel supply situation
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_2: As you may have heard, European fuel supply has been under pressure since late February due to the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. We would like to inform you in good time about what this means for your deliveries.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.li_html: Delivery times may increase from [date] from 3 to 5 to 7 working days.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.li_html_2: Fuel surcharge — from [date] we will charge a surcharge of [X%] on transport-sensitive orders, based on the current diesel price index. This surcharge is reviewed monthly.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.li_html_3: Bundled deliveries — to reduce trips, we bundle orders per region where possible. You can indicate a preferred delivery day.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_3: We follow the National Oil Crisis Plan and are optimising our logistics: route planning, fleet management and alternative suppliers. Our goal is to minimise the impact on you.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_4: You will receive an update every two weeks via [email / customer portal]. If you have questions about a specific order in the meantime, please contact us at [phone number] or [email address].
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_5: We appreciate your understanding and trust.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_20: This message combines the core elements of effective crisis communication: informing early, being transparent, remaining specific, putting the customer perspective first and offering a sense of agency. [14] [15] [17]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.li_html_4: Limit and optimise the vehicle fleet — consider a mobility budget instead of lease cars. [12]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.li_html_5: Refuel off motorways, combine trips per region and reward economical driving. [12]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.li: Carry out technical modifications: remove roof racks, check tyre pressure, use thinner engine oil.
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.li_html_6: Join the major consumers' consultation and industry associations that participate in government discussions on the National Oil Crisis Plan. [8]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.li_html_7: Monitor EU coordination group decisions and IEA market reports for early signals. [10] [5]
editorial_oil_shortage_2026.p_html_21: The better you are prepared internally, the more credible your external communication will be.
